title: Croptopia Blocky Crops
description: This resource pack makes most if not all of the Croptopia crops be 3D models
body:
Just make a modpack that adds in 3D models for all of the crops in croptopia so they don't look too boring

the models of the yam and sweet potato were inspired by MoCreaturesRemade's Crops 3D Reforged texture pack. And the rice textures were heavily "inspired" (literally 1:1 ;-;) by vectorwings's Farmer Delight mod

Hope you like it! ^^
